","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6YP+heeW6w6kdYgBzge270rxR3ogAf4bTKsaTnnYY5P","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/627bc5bb2614473da92d8d3633ff8d33~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529752&x-signature=A%2BPdLqGAG6qZ4%2BbbG5%2FUZnSmOKs%3D","user_id":"3197849238255679","user_name":"INFJP0"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3197849238255679","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":26,"fan_ranklist_title":"铁杆粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597978713052941337","book_info":{"abstract":"女强无cp+游戏降临+独狼+没有道德+轻微被迫害妄想症

2034年10月24日，血肉游戏降临地球，笼罩所有适龄人类。

在超凡与长生的诱惑面前，无数人毫不犹豫地选择了进入游戏。可此时的他们还不知道，胜者的名额，或许只有一个。

心怀利器，杀心自起。

身为一个和平年代出生的非战斗人员，洛以本以为自己会是个苟全性命于乱世的温柔水法，结果莫名其妙变成了一柄斧头砍遍诸天万界的近战法师。

因为害怕被杀死，所以只能先下手为强了。

叽里咕噜什么这的那的，和我的斧头说去吧！

排雷：
1. 我的女主要从尸山血海中走出来的，不要和我的女主谈道德，小说没有道德
2. 力竭了，段评骂章评骂书评骂，已经不看评论单机写文了，结果在作者有话要说里面还要骂我的女主，很想说道德感高要求多的人不爱看可以不看，不爱能不能别伤害？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/08273dbbcd7e38e79e9b3be6dc4f9da9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"机器貓1024","author_id":"","book_id":"7597978713052941337","book_name":"从获得游戏资格开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9449人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7602946647164731928","read_count":"9449","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"184632"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"83","tags":"游戏体育,系统,无限流,女强,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/08273dbbcd7e38e79e9b3be6dc4f9da9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779179399&x-signature=FWRwIiDVuGuKpcdHez5ek28TzfM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2246999510884139","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"33"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032016295955FEE1C915E0310355EF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"
